scripts.test: tsx --test src/lib/audit-log.test.ts src/lib/password.test.ts src/lib/permissions.test.ts src/modules/tasks/reverse-planning.test.ts src/modules/events/template-tasks.test.ts src/modules/events/readiness.test.ts src/modules/events/metrics.test.ts src/modules/communications/metrics.test.ts src/modules/run-of-show/schedule.test.ts src/modules/evaluations/metrics.test.ts src/modules/participants/metrics.test.ts src/modules/notifications/due-notifications.test.ts
scripts.quality: npm run db:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.db:setup: prisma generate && prisma validate && prisma migrate dev && prisma db seed
